## Additional context

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Do not use this template for security vulnerabilities. Follow the private reporting process in `SECURITY.md`.
> If GitHub Security or Dependabot already opened an alert or pull request for the same dependency or vulnerability, continue there instead of creating a duplicate public issue.
